title: Last Message
description:
In this single player game you will be using an in-game computer to message friends with Yak to stay connected and help each other survive the zombie world, Explore the web to see what's going on in the world and clear emails as the game progresses.

Leave your computer at any time and explore the non-digital world!

Explore your 'empty' apartment building for items to assist your nearby friends and uncover lost last messages from old tenants.

Watch your back! This world is still full of unfriendly people ~ including the vicious infected!
description_short: Use an in-game computer to chat with friends to stay connected and help each other. Explore your 'empty' apartment building for items to assist them and uncover lost messages.
